metadata.title:
TO NEW MEXICO AND ARIZONA:


DON'T ASK TOO MUCH

pages.raw_text:
Phoenix dispatch says that the working people of the
state of Arizona want to rule the roost 1t goes with
out saying that the corporations expect to do so.


1t is to be hoped that the workers will win. But they
should mix brains with their agitation and while wise
serpents they should nearly doveke in harmless
possible.


Their constitution, like that of New Mexico must run
the gauntlet at Washington For one ordeal it must be
approved by William Howard Taft. Mr. Taft has in the
Oklahoma episode set himself strongly against democratic
constitutions.


The people of Arizona and New Mexico should draw
their constitutions simply and plainly democratic that
when Mr. Taft refuses to approve either or both of them
he will be put clearly in the position of opposing democ-
racy and the rule Of the people He should be given
advantage in the introduction of things however good
which can be sneered off as isms" The ISSUE if is
made, should be plain, simple and clear cut


Universal suffrage may we'll go n--for Mr.. Taft will
have the hardhood to withhold approval that
account Universal suffrage too clearly where
it has been tried and he will not to offend the women
voters of the universal suffrage states


Amendment of the constitution by ority vote of the
peopethat should 60 in. 1t will be bitter pill for Mr.
Taft but it should be administered So should the init
alive the referendum and the recall These democratic
essentials And there If may presume to advise, we
should stop.


The dispatches state that house Legislature pro-
posed that the state to the right to into bust
ness that it shall have the right to seize the property Of
people alone and not the courts shall have the right to
declare laws unconstitutional that there shall be strong
anti-injunction provisions, and the like


Well and good Many of these things good. Some
of them debatabe Doubtless the people of Arizona
and New Mexico the best judges of what they want.
If it suits them it suits


But isn't the first step to get into the union and take
the sovere gnty of the stae'


With easily amended constitution providing for the
initiative the referendum and the recall the constitution
can be made at will after statehood is gained Why
put things in that will enable the Washington ring to
shout Socialism and 'Anarchyl" and ConfiscatOn!''
